popularStory.headline: Marguerite de Dampierre (1251-1285)
popularStory.description:
Marguerite de Dampierre(° 1251 † 3 juillet 1285), fille de Gui de Dampierre, marquis de Namur et comte de Flandre et de sa première épouse Mahaut de Béthune.

En 1273, elle épouse Jean Ier, duc de Bra …

sourceList.title: Guy Dampierre HAD 2 DAUGHTERS NAMED "MARGARET de FLANDERS", 1 FROM EACH MARRIAGE! DO NOT MERGE!! WITH 2cnd wife  Isabelle of Luxembourg:
Marguerite de Flandre-Dampierre, "Find A Grave Index"

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Flandres於1265年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯達皮時，她的父親Guy de Dampierre40歲，母親Isabelle de Luxembourg18歲。她於1282年11月15日與Alexander of Scotland, 1st Laird of Mangerton Castle在蘇格蘭洛包爾結婚。她去世於1327年10月17日之後，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Flandres于1265年出生在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯達皮时，她的父亲Guy de Dampierre40岁，母亲Isabelle de Luxembourg18岁。她于1282年11月15日与Alexander of Scotland, 1st Laird of Mangerton Castle在苏格兰洛包爾结婚。她去世于1327年10月17日之后，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Flandres
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Fleming
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Flandres was born in 1265, in Dampierre, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Guy de Dampierre, was 40 and her mother, Isabelle de Luxembourg, was 18. She married Alexander of Scotland, 1st Laird of Mangerton Castle on 15 November 1282, in Roxburghshire, Scotland. She died after 17 October 1327, and was buried in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Flandres est née en 1265, à Dampierre, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Guy de Dampierre, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Luxembourg, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander of Scotland, 1st Laird of Mangerton Castle le 15 novembre 1282, à Roxburghshire, Écosse. Elle est décédée après 17 octobre 1327, et a été enterrée à Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Flandres 1265 in Dampierre, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de Dampierre 40 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Luxembourg 18. Sie hat am 15. November 1282 in Roxburghshire, Scotland Alexander of Scotland, 1st Laird of Mangerton Castle geheiratet. Sie starb nach 17. Oktober 1327 und wurde in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Flandres è nata il nel 1265 nel Dampierre, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Guy de Dampierre, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Luxembourg, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Alexander of Scotland, 1st Laird of Mangerton Castle il 15 novembre 1282, nel Roxburghshire, Scotland. Morì dopo il 17 ottobre 1327, e fu sepolta a Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Flandresが1265年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスダンパエアで生まれた時，父Guy de Dampierreは40歳，母Isabelle de Luxembourgは18歳であった。1282年11月15日にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアでAlexander of Scotland, 1st Laird of Mangerton Castleと結婚した。彼女は1327年10月17日以後に死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-サイント-デニスサイント-デニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Flandres(이)가 1265년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 댐피르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Dampierre(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Luxembourg(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1282년 11월 15일 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에서 Alexander of Scotland, 1st Laird of Mangerton Castle(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1327년 10월 17일 이후 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-세인트-데니스 세인트-데니스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Flandres nasceu em 1265, em Dampierre, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Guy de Dampierre, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Luxembourg, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander of Scotland, 1st Laird of Mangerton Castle em 15 de novembro de 1282, em Roxburghshire, Scotland. Ela faleceu após 17 de outubro de 1327, e foi sepultada em Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Flandres родилась в 1265 г. в местности дампьирр, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy de Dampierre было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Luxembourg, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander of Scotland, 1st Laird of Mangerton Castle 15 ноября 1282 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия. Она умерла после 17 октябрь 1327 г. и была похоронена в местности сеинт-денис, сине-сеинт-денис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Flandres nació en 1265, en Dampierre, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guy de Dampierre, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Luxembourg, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Alexander of Scotland, 1st Laird of Mangerton Castle el 15 de noviembre de 1282, en Roxburghshire, Scotland. Murió después de 17 de octubre de 1327, y fue sepultada en Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.
